tasks.subject: [command-palette-10x] [P4] Update documentation for new palette features
tasks.description:
Update contributing documentation to reflect the new palette keyboard shortcuts, animation patterns, and ADR status.

## Steps

1. Update `contributing/keyboard-shortcuts.md` -- add the following new shortcuts:

| Key | Context | Action |
|---|---|---|
| Cmd+Enter / Ctrl+Enter | Command palette, agent selected | Open agent in new browser tab (fast path) |
| > prefix | Command palette search input | Filter to commands only |
| Backspace | Command palette, empty input, in sub-menu | Go back one level |
| Escape | Command palette, in sub-menu | Go back one level (does not close dialog) |
| Enter | Command palette, agent selected | Open agent sub-menu (drill-down) |

2. Update `contributing/animations.md` -- add two new patterns:

layoutId selection indicator pattern:
- Use case: Sliding selection pill effect in lists with keyboard navigation
- Implementation: motion.div with layoutId="unique-id", position: absolute, inset-0 inside each selectable item
- Item content must be position: relative, z-10 to render above the indicator
- Wrap list in <LayoutGroup> to scope the layoutId
- Spring config: stiffness: 500, damping: 40
- Respects prefers-reduced-motion via existing MotionConfig

Stagger-on-open pattern:
- Use case: Items stagger-animate on dialog/page open, but NOT on every search keystroke
- Implementation: Use a staggerKey state that only changes on open/page transition events
- staggerChildren: 0.04 (40ms per item), delayChildren: 0.05
- Limit stagger to first 8 visible items for performance
- Items beyond the limit render immediately without animation

3. Update `decisions/0063-shadcn-command-dialog-for-global-palette.md` -- change status from proposed to accepted in the YAML frontmatter, since the palette is now implemented and being enhanced.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] contributing/keyboard-shortcuts.md updated with 5 new palette shortcuts
- [ ] contributing/animations.md updated with layoutId selection indicator and stagger-on-open patterns
- [ ] decisions/0063-shadcn-command-dialog-for-global-palette.md status updated to accepted
- [ ] Documentation uses consistent formatting with existing content
- [ ] No new documentation files created (only existing files updated)
tasks.activeForm: Updating documentation for new palette features
